current_run.description: This problem aims to find a secret modular polynomial P(x) = a_k * x^k + ... + a_1 * x + a_0 (mod M) for a secret vector of coefficients 'a' and a public modulus M. The oracle computes f(x) = P(x) mod M. This is non-linear for k >= 2 and involves modular arithmetic beyond simple bitwise operations. We are looking for the coefficients of the polynomial.
